chemistry.scope_summary: Cross-electrophile coupling of alkyl and aryl halides demonstrated with two pharmaceutically relevant heterocyclic compounds

optimization_table.key_findings: CSTR 2 demonstrated stable operation for 13 h with gram-scale synthesis achieved. Flow rate optimization showed CSTR 2 close to ideal RTD behavior at 0.5 mL/min.

figures.flow_path: Inlet for hydraulic liquid → PTFE CSTR cascade → Outlet of the slurry
figures.key_information: Multi-stage CSTR cascade reactor with PTFE construction, magnetic stirring, and hydraulic liquid feed system
figures.caption: Figure 1. (a) Exploded-view computer-aided design (CAD) model of the CSTR cascade for handling solid-containing photochemical reactions.

figures.flow_path: Slurry feed enters CSTR cascade with gravity assistance, Ar gas provided separately
figures.light_source_position: Blue LEDs positioned above reactor with focusing lenses
figures.key_information: Photochemical reactor setup with CSTR cascade, blue LED illumination with focusing lenses, gravity-fed slurry system with Ar atmosphere
figures.caption: Figure 2. (a) Schematic of the photo-CSTR platform including the slurry pump, CSTR cascade, 3 light-emitting diode (LED) light sources (440 nm), focusing lenses, and the pressurized fraction collector
Figure 6. (c) The plot of the absorbed photon flux vs LED power

figures.trend: Conversion reaches 100% and remains stable; Yield increases then plateaus around 77%
figures.caption: Figure 9. (b) Gram-scale synthesis over 13 h of operation using CSTR 2 and DME as the system solvent

translation_logic.batch_limitation: No batch baseline reported in this work
translation_logic.flow_advantage: CSTR cascade platform enables handling of solid-containing reactions, provides stable operation for 13 h with gram-scale synthesis, and allows slurry feeding capability
translation_logic.what_changed: Implementation of CSTR cascade reactor with slurry feeding capability for heterogeneous photoredox reactions
translation_logic.what_stayed_same: Same metallaphotoredox cross-electrophile coupling chemistry with Ir/Ni dual catalysis
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Continuous operation under inert atmosphere with improved handling of solid reagents

figure_descriptions: CSTR cascade reactor design with PTFE construction
Photo-CSTR platform with LED illumination and slurry feeding
Gram-scale synthesis performance over 13 h operation

notes: This work focuses on continuous flow implementation of metallaphotoredox chemistry using a novel CSTR cascade platform. No direct batch comparison is provided, but the work demonstrates stable gram-scale operation over 13 h. The reactor design enables handling of heterogeneous reactions with solid reagents through slurry feeding capability.
